zh.lifeSummary: 當Rudolf II von Werdenberg-Sargans於1265年出生在瑞士聖 加倫格拉布斯維爾登格時，他的父親Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans38歲，母親Elizabeth von ORTENBURG32歲。他和Adelheid von Burgau至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1322年9月28日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 姆爾爾多福 阿姆 音享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rudolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

variants.name: Rudolph
meanings: From root of Randolph for Radolph.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.
Decisive Battle against the counts of Habsburg.

en.lifeSummary: When Rudolf II von Werdenberg-Sargans was born in 1265, in Werdenberg, Grabs, Sankt Gallen, Switzerland, his father, Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans, was 38 and his mother, Elizabeth von ORTENBURG, was 32. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Adelheid von Burgau. He died on 28 September 1322, in Mühldorf, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rudolf II von Werdenberg-Sargans est né en 1265, à Werdenberg, Grabs, St-Gall, Suisse, son père, Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth von ORTENBURG, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Adelheid von Burgau. Il est décédé le 28 septembre 1322, à Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 57 ans.

Er hatte mit Adelheid von Burgau mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. September 1322 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Deutschland.

ko.Muhldorf, Bavaria, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 uh도르프 아 이
ko.lifeSummary: Rudolf II von Werdenberg-Sargans(이)가 1265년 스위스 스트. 갈렌 그라브스 워덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth von ORTENBURG(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Burgau(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 9월 28일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 uh도르프 아 이에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rudolf II von Werdenberg-Sargans родился в 1265 г. в местности вирденбирг, грабс, ст. галлен, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Hartmann von Werdenberg-Sargans I - Count Werdenberg-Sargans было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth von ORTENBURG, 32.
